meaning: n.[希神]卡尔克斯(特洛伊战争中希腊军队方面的阿波罗奉祀祭司和随军占卜师)
examples: Achilles did so and Calchas declared Chryseis must be returned to her father.
The seer calchas after consulting an oracle revealed the cause of the trouble.
Calchas correctly determined the source of the trouble but would not speak unless Achilles vowed to protect him.
